tasks.title: T1: Add terminal cleanup reaper spec deltas and structural guard tests

metadata.contract_refs: implements: AC10; verifies: AC5, AC9, AC10, AC11; respects: DONT2, DONT4, DONT5

tasks.verification: Completed T1. RED failed on missing rq-terminalCleanup* spec requirements; GREEN passed after adding worktree-lifecycle spec deltas and asset guard tests. Checkpoint commit e3f418fa.
tasks.summary: Added four worktree-lifecycle spec-law requirements: rq-terminalCleanupReaper01, rq-terminalCleanupSafety01, rq-terminalCleanupVisibility01, rq-terminalCleanupLifecycle01. Added `plugin/src/__tests__/worktree-lifecycle-assets.test.ts` to assert requirement presence/content and guard against direct `git worktree remove` calls outside the existing removal primitive. Verified with `pnpm test -- src/__tests__/worktree-lifecycle-assets.test.ts`.
tasks.implementation_summary: Added four worktree-lifecycle spec-law requirements: rq-terminalCleanupReaper01, rq-terminalCleanupSafety01, rq-terminalCleanupVisibility01, rq-terminalCleanupLifecycle01. Verified with `pnpm test -- src/__tests__/worktree-lifecycle-assets.test.ts`.

tasks.title: T2: Extract shared pending-delete drain primitive

metadata.contract_refs: implements: AC1, AC5, AC6, AC7, AC9; verifies: AC3, AC5, AC6, AC7, AC9, AC11; respects: C3, DONT2, DONT4

tasks.verification: Completed T2. Checkpoint commit fe436bbc. RED failed on missing drainPendingDeletes export/implementation; GREEN passed after extracting shared drain and routing manual/plugin cleanup through it.
tasks.summary: Extracted exported `drainPendingDeletes(trigger, deps, options)` shared primitive in `plugin/src/tools/worktree/index.ts`. It drains known pending deletes, respects automatic retry caps unless `forceAttempts` is set, preserves dry-run as non-mutating, uses the `AdvWorktreeDeleteDeps` bundle including `store`, delegates all removal attempts to `advWorktreeDelete`, clears successful entries, and increments retained failures. Routed `advWorktreeCleanup` and the plugin-local `processPendingDeletes` wrapper through this shared primitive. Added focused tests in `plugin/src/tools/worktree/index-delete.test.ts` for retry-cap behavior, dry-run non-mutation, and store-aware registry-drift cleanup. Also made the test helper use per-temp-repo pending-delete project IDs to avoid leaked external pending-delete state across tests.
tasks.implementation_summary: Extracted exported `drainPendingDeletes(trigger, deps, options)` shared primitive in `plugin/src/tools/worktree/index.ts`. It drains known pending deletes, respects automatic retry caps unless `forceAttempts` is set, preserves dry-run as non-mutating, uses the `AdvWorktreeDeleteDeps` bundle including `store`, delegates all removal attempts to `advWorktreeDelete`, clears successful entries, and increments retained failures. Routed `advWorktreeCleanup` and the plugin-local `processPendingDeletes` wrapper through this shared primitive. Added focused tests in `plugin/src/tools/worktree/index-delete.test.ts` for retry-cap behavior, dry-run non-mutation, and store-aware registry-drift cleanup. Also made the test helper use per-temp-repo pending-delete project IDs to avoid leaked external pending-delete state across tests.

tasks.title: T3: Route startup and session.deleted cleanup through the shared store-aware path

metadata.contract_refs: implements: AC1, AC2, AC4, AC9; verifies: AC1, AC2, AC3, AC4, AC5, AC6, AC9, AC11; respects: C1, C2, C3, C5, DONT1, DONT2, DONT4

tasks.verification: Completed T3. Checkpoint commit 41f1f9a. RED failed because plugin startup did not drain pending deletes; GREEN passed after adding bounded startup drain and routing main plugin startup/session.deleted through the store-aware shared drain.
tasks.summary: Added bounded startup pending-delete drain to the legacy `WorktreePlugin`, reusing the shared `drainPendingDeletes` primitive and shared `warpDeps`. Routed the main ADV plugin through the same shared drain with durable `store` for both startup and `session.deleted`, before store close. Added startup test coverage in `plugin/src/tools/worktree/index-delete.test.ts` proving known pending deletes are retried on plugin startup. Startup/session.deleted use `forceAttempts: false`, so automatic triggers respect the retry cap and drain known pending deletes only.
tasks.implementation_summary: Added bounded startup pending-delete drain to the legacy `WorktreePlugin`, reusing the shared `drainPendingDeletes` primitive and shared `warpDeps`. Routed the main ADV plugin through the same shared drain with durable `store` for both startup and `session.deleted`, before store close. Added startup test coverage in `plugin/src/tools/worktree/index-delete.test.ts` proving known pending deletes are retried on plugin startup. Startup/session.deleted use `forceAttempts: false`, so automatic triggers respect the retry cap and drain known pending deletes only.

tasks.title: T4: Add full terminal cleanup discovery for manual/status/archive triggers

metadata.contract_refs: implements: AC1, AC3, AC4, AC8; verifies: AC1, AC3, AC4, AC5, AC6, AC8, AC11; respects: C2, C4, DONT2, DONT3, DONT6

tasks.verification: Completed T4. Checkpoint commit 9b8badc. RED failed because manual cleanup did not discover terminal worktrees without pending-delete entries; GREEN passed after adding full terminal discovery and wiring manual/status/archive triggers.
tasks.summary: Added `discoverTerminalCleanupCandidates` in `plugin/src/tools/worktree/index.ts`. It scans git worktree facts, infers `change/*` owners, verifies terminal change state from the durable store (`archived` or `closed`), queues candidates with `setPendingDelete`, then lets the shared drain and `advWorktreeDelete` enforce merged/clean/live-CWD safety structurally. Manual `advWorktreeCleanup` now runs discovery before draining by default; startup/session.deleted still call `drainPendingDeletes` directly and therefore do not run full discovery. Wired best-effort status-triggered cleanup before worktree census in `plugin/src/tools/status.ts`, and archive-triggered cleanup after durable archive status transition in `plugin/src/tools/change.ts`. Added RED/GREEN test coverage for manual discovery of an archived change worktree with no existing pending-delete entry.
tasks.implementation_summary: Added `discoverTerminalCleanupCandidates` in `plugin/src/tools/worktree/index.ts`. It scans git worktree facts, infers `change/*` owners, verifies terminal change state from the durable store (`archived` or `closed`), queues candidates with `setPendingDelete`, then lets the shared drain and `advWorktreeDelete` enforce merged/clean/live-CWD safety structurally. Manual `advWorktreeCleanup` now runs discovery before draining by default; startup/session.deleted still call `drainPendingDeletes` directly and therefore do not run full discovery. Wired best-effort status-triggered cleanup before worktree census in `plugin/src/tools/status.ts`, and archive-triggered cleanup after durable archive status transition in `plugin/src/tools/change.ts`. Added RED/GREEN test coverage for manual discovery of an archived change worktree with no existing pending-delete entry.

tasks.title: T5: Surface retained terminal cleanup blockers in status and triage

metadata.contract_refs: implements: AC8; verifies: AC8, AC11; respects: SC5, C4, DONT6

tasks.verification: Completed T5. Checkpoint commit 683435c. RED failed because retained cleanup blockers were absent from status/triage; GREEN passed after adding status aggregates and triage exact details.
tasks.summary: Added shared pending-delete classification and aggregation helpers in `plugin/src/tools/worktree/state.ts`. `adv_status` now surfaces `terminal_cleanup_retained` as count/classes only, and formatted Worktrees output includes retained cleanup counts without paths. `adv_worktree_triage` now reports exact retained terminal cleanup pending-delete blockers with branch, path, reason, attempts, and remediation. Added tests in `plugin/src/tools/status.test.ts` and `plugin/src/tools/worktree/triage.test.ts`.
tasks.implementation_summary: Added shared pending-delete classification and aggregation helpers in `plugin/src/tools/worktree/state.ts`. `adv_status` now surfaces `terminal_cleanup_retained` as count/classes only, and formatted Worktrees output includes retained cleanup counts without paths. `adv_worktree_triage` now reports exact retained terminal cleanup pending-delete blockers with branch, path, reason, attempts, and remediation. Added tests in `plugin/src/tools/status.test.ts` and `plugin/src/tools/worktree/triage.test.ts`.

tasks.title: T6: Preserve retry semantics and classify retained cleanup failures

metadata.contract_refs: implements: AC6, AC7; verifies: AC6, AC7, AC11; respects: C3, C5

tasks.verification: Completed T6. Checkpoint commit 706e073. RED failed because retained pending-delete failures lacked metadata; GREEN passed after persisting lastError/lastErrorClass and using classification in status summaries.
tasks.summary: Extended pending-delete records with optional `lastError` and `lastErrorClass` while preserving backwards compatibility for old JSON records. Added `recordPendingDeleteFailure` to atomically increment attempts and persist failure metadata. Updated the shared drain to record classified retained failures for in-use and failed delete attempts. Status aggregation now prefers `lastErrorClass` when present. Added tests for persisted retained failure metadata and exhausted-retry status aggregation behavior.
tasks.implementation_summary: Extended pending-delete records with optional `lastError` and `lastErrorClass` while preserving backwards compatibility for old JSON records. Added `recordPendingDeleteFailure` to atomically increment attempts and persist failure metadata. Updated the shared drain to record classified retained failures for in-use and failed delete attempts. Status aggregation now prefers `lastErrorClass` when present. Added tests for persisted retained failure metadata and exhausted-retry status aggregation behavior.

tasks.title: T7: Final integration verification for terminal cleanup reaper

metadata.contract_refs: verifies: AC1, AC2, AC3, AC4, AC5, AC6, AC7, AC8, AC9, AC10, AC11; respects: C1-C6, DONT1-DONT6, OOS1-OOS7

tasks.verification: Acceptance review remediation: adv-reviewer changed triage recommendations to route orphan cleanup through adv_worktree_delete instead of manual deletion. Verification passed: pnpm test -- src/tools/worktree/triage.test.ts src/__tests__/worktree-lifecycle-assets.test.ts.

wisdom.content: Worktree pending-delete state is durable external project state, not temp-repo-local. Tests using a fixed WorktreeStateAccess.projectId can leak queued deletes/attempt counts across runs; use a unique projectId per temp fixture when asserting pending-delete behavior.

Worktree cleanup recommendations should not suggest manual filesystem/git deletion for ADV worktrees; route operators through adv_worktree_delete so durable terminal-state, merged, clean, and live-CWD gates stay centralized.
